evidence: If you enjoy gritty, adult police stories, you gotta watch this show.
Worth watching if you enjoy stories of gritty police work.
Plots are beginning to look a lot like The Good Wife.
The endings are too predictable to watch for more than a few episodes.
Sappy but with enough action to make stay with it.
Starts off with you disliking the main character but you kinda learn to like him in a morally incorrect way.
Fairly well written and well acted.
The quality of the video improved vastly as HD became the norm.
I have seen most of these episodes before but it is still entertaining to watch character development.
Hope you can produce another season that is as good.
The use of language is nothing short of addictive.
It is quite entertaining to see how the Vic will get out of the latest hole.
Be careful what you wish for. The absence of any good guys on this series should not deter you from watching the series.
A difficult movie to find on Netflix or Amazon.

summary: The user enjoys gritty police dramas with a focus on character development and well-written narratives. They appreciate high production quality but have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, often finding plots predictable.
